title: MABIS Decorative Storage Apothecary Clear Glass Jar for Kitchen, Bathroom or Laundry Organization, Medical Sundry Jar with Metal Lid, 4.1 x 3.9 x 7 inches
description:
About this item
BEAUTIFUL AND FUNCTIONAL this versatile jar can store anything from candy to cotton balls. This canister adds a beautiful decorative accent to a powder room, bathroom vanity, countertops, makeup table or laundry room. Helps provide an organized finishing touch to any room
DURABLE DISHWASHER SAFE GLASS does not contain imprints for easy viewing of contents. Glass Jar will not tip or shatter
INCLUDES ALUMINUM LID that lifts on and off easily. No need to worry about lining up screw treads. The wide mouth makes accessing necessities easy and simple
PRODUCT SPECS: Set includes 1 jar and 1 lid. Dimensions of jar are 4.1 x 3.9 x 7 inches and can hold approx. 28-32 ounces
reviews_5s: Good product for storageWonderful jars with lots of decorative and functional uses. I used mine for holding Spa essentials in a bathroom. But, these simply elegant jars are so nice looking that they could hold almost anything someone wanted to put on display, especially things that looks pretty or colorful.Bought this for my daily contacts for on top of my counter. It's a perfect size, I fit about 30 days worth of contacts in the jar and my hand fits in and out of it.Worth it! Heavy glass. Nice looking jars. Packaged to ship anywhere.The glass on this is really thick! It may live forever. The lid is nice too.I already had two this size and wanted a third for my bathroom. I think they are a bit over priced for made in china goods.This was exactly what I wanted it to be. It's exactly what they have in the doctors office. Glass jar is sturdy and good quality. So happy with it!Perfect size for stuffing with tea bags and keeping on the counter. The lid does not affix tightly to the jar opening, so don't tilt it over or leave it near the edge of the counter. I'm getting another one of these for cotton balls!Put my cotton balls inside. I use them a lot since I'm diabetic and need to check my blood sugars often. Makes storage of my cotton balls more organized and neat appearing.Very well packaged and exactly as description says!
reviews_1s: I wouldn't have paid that price for ONE jar ... but that's what I did. It's not worth that price. The picture is totally misleading. I thought the rack was sold separately. If you show a picture of a SET of 5 jars, that's what you expect to get. The item is even presented in the plural JARS. Not one jar, JARS. Rip off!I’d rate it zero if I could for the completely misleading description. I ordered GLASS jars with metal lids. I received PLASTIC jars with plastic lids. Very unhappy, I needed glass jars.As did several other people on the reviews, I ordered what was described as a glass jar and got a cheap plastic jar instead. Really disappointing.Was nothing like the picture. Jar is all thick plastic- including the lid. Does not have glass or metal at all.Very misleading. Don't buy unless you only want a single jar. All verbiage in the description refers to "jars" and the picture shows five jars. You will only receive one jar.Description clearly says glass. Dime store plastic junk. Absolutely ridiculous.I received a plastic jar and plastic lid. Absolutely not the glass & chrome container that I ordered!THIS IS PLASTIC even though it CLEARLY SAYS GLASS complete RIP OFF! STAY AWAY FROM THIS SELLER!Extremely uneven bottom.I thought it would have been smaller, but it is the size you see in a doctor's office
